title: Add ack/finish default-off and token-gate API specs
forbidden_scope: Do not edit production API files.
Do not change endpoint paths, DTO shapes, auth token fallback behavior, Prisma schema, migrations, or task-pull response shapes.
Do not touch unrelated server-executor queue, lease, adapter, or supervisor code.
acceptance: Ack spec proves default-off or missing/invalid token rejects before serverExecutionJob.updateMany/findUnique and preserves the existing enabled response assertions.
Finish spec proves default-off or missing/invalid token rejects before readClaimedJob/updateMany/findUnique/syncAfterFinish and preserves existing finished/no-finish response assertions.
Tests assert no DB mutation or linked-run sync happens on rejected lifecycle requests.
No production behavior changes; endpoint response compatibility remains unchanged.
